calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2013 Off Calendar

Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Stephen L. Porter, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Whitehead & Porter LLP
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Rich Ashley.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $21,676
Pre-Judgment Interest: $2995.00
Costs: $609.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $25,280.00
Judgment signed in open court.
